enterprise_decision_maker.label: Enterprise Decision Maker
enterprise_decision_maker.description: C-suite and VP-level buyers at large organizations. Values credibility over creativity. Data > emotion. Needs to justify purchase to a committee.
enterprise_decision_maker.typography: serif or geometric sans-serif, large, authoritative, high contrast
enterprise_decision_maker.psychology_note: Values credibility over creativity. Data > emotion. Needs to justify purchase to a committee. ROI and risk mitigation are key drivers.

gen_z_consumer.label: Gen Z Consumer
gen_z_consumer.description: Digital natives (born 1997-2012). Detects and rejects inauthenticity instantly. Prefers raw over polished. Humor > authority.
gen_z_consumer.typography: variable weight, mixed case, sometimes intentionally 'ugly', expressive, deconstructed
gen_z_consumer.psychology_note: Detects and rejects inauthenticity instantly. Prefers raw over polished. Humor > authority. Values self-expression and social causes.

smb_founder.label: SMB Founder / Startup CEO
smb_founder.description: Time-poor, ROI-focused. Needs to look professional without being intimidating. Authenticity matters.
smb_founder.typography: friendly sans-serif (Inter, Outfit, Plus Jakarta Sans), medium weight, approachable
smb_founder.psychology_note: Time-poor, ROI-focused. Needs to look professional without being intimidating. Authenticity matters. Wears multiple hats.

creative_professional.label: Creative Professional / Designer
creative_professional.description: Discerning eye, values craft and originality. Expects design excellence. Responds to innovative aesthetics.
creative_professional.typography: expressive, considered, often a statement itself, custom or premium typefaces
creative_professional.psychology_note: Values craft and originality. Expects design excellence. Will immediately notice poor typography or lazy color choices. Design IS the content.

health_wellness_consumer.label: Health & Wellness Consumer
health_wellness_consumer.description: Seeks balance, authenticity, and natural living. Values holistic wellness and mindful consumption.
health_wellness_consumer.typography: light weight sans-serif, generous spacing, clean, breathable
health_wellness_consumer.psychology_note: Seeks authenticity and natural connection. Mistrusts overly commercial messaging. Values community, mindfulness, and holistic well-being.

luxury_consumer.label: Luxury Consumer
luxury_consumer.description: Expects exclusivity and premium quality. Responds to aspirational imagery and understated elegance.
luxury_consumer.typography: serif or thin sans-serif, elegant spacing, refined, often all-caps with wide tracking
luxury_consumer.psychology_note: Scarcity and exclusivity drive desire. Less is more. Premium positioning requires restraint. Aspiration > information.

developer_technical.label: Developer / Technical Audience
developer_technical.description: Analytically minded, skeptical of marketing speak. Values substance, clear documentation, and technical accuracy.
developer_technical.typography: monospace for code, clean sans-serif (JetBrains Mono, SF Mono, Inter) for UI, clear hierarchy
developer_technical.psychology_note: Deeply skeptical of marketing. Will investigate claims. Values clear documentation and honest communication. Show, don't tell.

parent_family.label: Parent / Family Decision Maker
parent_family.description: Safety-conscious, value-driven, time-poor. Looking for trustworthy, wholesome brands that simplify family life.
parent_family.typography: rounded friendly sans-serif, clear readable sizes, warm and approachable
parent_family.psychology_note: Safety and trust are paramount. Testimonials and social proof from other parents carry enormous weight. Convenience is a major selling point.
